The Lists tab on its Offline segment, with the Offline/Online/Trips control and your offline lists.
The Online segment — your geocaching.com bookmark lists, including the Ignore List, with cache counts.
The Trips segment holds trip lists for planning a route of caches.
Confirming an Add to List — how many geocaches will be saved offline, plus Download Images and Show in CarPlay.
An offline list in List mode — sortable cache rows with distance, D/T, size and GC code.
The offline list … menu — update caches, download images, highlight, export GPX and more.
